mapper.sql: contract_id, user_id, status, total_amount, vehicle_model_id, vin, contract_start_time, contract_end_time, billing_start_time, billing_end_time, delivery_vehicle, pick_up_vehicle, pick_store_id, return_store_id, is_delete, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM contract_info ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM contract_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM contract_info WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contract_info ( contract_id, user_id, status, total_amount, vehicle_model_id, vin, contract_start_time, contract_end_time, billing_start_time, billing_end_time, delivery_vehicle, pick_up_vehicle, pick_store_id, return_store_id, is_delete, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by ) VALUES ( #{contractId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, #{vehicleModelId}, #{vin}, #{contractStartTime}, #{contractEndTime}, #{billingStartTime}, #{billingEndTime}, #{deliveryVehicle}, #{pickUpVehicle}, #{pickStoreId}, #{returnStoreId}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateTime}, #{updateBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE contract_info SET user_id = #{userId}, status = #{status}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, vehicle_model_id = #{vehicleModelId}, vin = #{vin}, contract_start_time = #{contractStartTime}, contract_end_time = #{contractEndTime}, billing_start_time = #{billingStartTime}, billing_end_time = #{billingEndTime}, delivery_vehicle = #{deliveryVehicle}, pick_up_vehicle = #{pickUpVehicle}, pick_store_id = #{pickStoreId}, return_store_id = #{returnStoreId}, is_delete = #{isDelete}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE contract_id = #{contractId}
